title: Scale Result
description: Returns the scale of the object found.
notes: You can use the Scale result to determine the size of the object found compared to the size of the model trained.   When ScaleEnable is False, a small variation in scale is tolerated, so the Scale result may not always be exactly 1.  To ensure Scale to be only 1, you must set ScaleEnable to True, and set ScaleFactorMin = 1.0, and ScaleFactorMax = 1.0.
see_also:
Applies To

Vision Objects: Geometric, Correlation

ScaleEnable Property

Vision Objects: Scale Result

Geometric
